config.classifiers:
<#if pbit0\-tc?has_content>
					
						cls0-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
            match-all-filter
						
              
                <#if cls0\-pbit\-value\-0?has_content>
                  0
                  ${cls0\-pbit\-value\-0}
                </#if>
                <#if cls0\-pbit\-value\-1?has_content>
                  1
                  ${cls0\-pbit\-value\-1}
                </#if>
              
            
						
							scheduling-traffic-class
							${pbit0\-tc}
						
        						
					
				</#if>
				<#if pbit1\-tc?has_content>
					
						cls1-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
            match-all-filter
						
              
                <#if cls1\-pbit\-value\-0?has_content>
                  0
                  ${cls1\-pbit\-value\-0}
                <#elseif cls1\-pbit\-value\-1?has_content>
                  1
                  ${cls1\-pbit\-value\-1}
                </#if>
              
            
						
							scheduling-traffic-class
							${pbit1\-tc}
						
					
				</#if>
				<#if pbit2\-tc?has_content>
					
						cls2-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
            match-all-filter
						
              
                <#if cls2\-pbit\-value\-0?has_content>
                  0
                  ${cls2\-pbit\-value\-0}
                <#elseif cls2\-pbit\-value\-1?has_content>
                  1
                  ${cls2\-pbit\-value\-1}
                </#if>
              
            
						
							scheduling-traffic-class
							${pbit2\-tc}
						
					
				</#if>
				<#if pbit3\-tc?has_content>
					
						cls3-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
            match-all-filter
						
              
                <#if cls3\-pbit\-value\-0?has_content>
                  0
                  ${cls3\-pbit\-value\-0}
                <#elseif cls3\-pbit\-value\-1?has_content>
                  1
                  ${cls3\-pbit\-value\-1}
                </#if>
              
            
						
							scheduling-traffic-class
							${pbit3\-tc}
						
					
				</#if>
				<#if pbit4\-tc?has_content>
					
						cls4-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
            match-all-filter
						
              
                <#if cls4\-pbit\-value\-0?has_content>
                  0
                  ${cls4\-pbit\-value\-0}
                <#elseif cls4\-pbit\-value\-1?has_content>
                  1
                  ${cls4\-pbit\-value\-1}
                </#if>
              
            
						
							scheduling-traffic-class
							${pbit4\-tc}
						
					
				</#if>
				<#if pbit5\-tc?has_content>
					
						cls5-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
            match-all-filter
						
              
                <#if cls5\-pbit\-value\-0?has_content>
                  0
                  ${cls5\-pbit\-value\-0}
                <#elseif cls5\-pbit\-value\-1?has_content>
                  1
                  ${cls5\-pbit\-value\-1}
                </#if>
              
            
						
							scheduling-traffic-class
							${pbit5\-tc}
						
					
				</#if>
				<#if pbit6\-tc?has_content>
					
						cls6-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
            match-all-filter
						
              
                <#if cls6\-pbit\-value\-0?has_content>
                  0
                  ${cls6\-pbit\-value\-0}
                <#elseif cls6\-pbit\-value\-1?has_content>
                  1
                  ${cls6\-pbit\-value\-1}
                </#if>
              
            
						
							scheduling-traffic-class
							${pbit6\-tc}
						
					
				</#if>
				<#if pbit7\-tc?has_content>
					
						cls7-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
            match-all-filter
						
              
                <#if cls7\-pbit\-value\-0?has_content>
                  0
                  ${cls7\-pbit\-value\-0}
                <#elseif cls7\-pbit\-value\-1?has_content>
                  1
                  ${cls7\-pbit\-value\-1}
                </#if>
              
            
						
							scheduling-traffic-class
							${pbit7\-tc}
						
					
				</#if>
